attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT AS BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT        
,COALESCE(NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,-999)            
,ST.QUANTITY AS PO_LINE_ORDERED_QTY           
,COALESCE(ST.UNIT_PRICE,-999.0000000)  AS PO_LINE_UNIT_PRICE_TRXL_AMT  
,-999.0000000 DV_INCRMNTL_CHANGE_TRXL_AMT   
,COALESCE(ST.CLOSED_CODE,'OPEN')  AS PO_LINE_STATUS_CD
,COALESCE(ST.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS PO_LINE_ITEM_DESC
,COALESCE(ST.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,'N')  AS CURRENT_RECORD_FLG        
,CASE WHEN ST.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Misc.Services' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_ROLE 
,CASE WHEN SERVICE_ROLE = 'Y' THEN CAST(CAST((ST.ATTRIBUTE4 ) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE) END AS RU_SERVICE_START_DT
,CASE WHEN SERVICE_ROLE = 'Y' THEN CAST(CAST((ST.ATTRIBUTE5 ) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE) END AS RU_SERVICE_END_DT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE  
FROM
(
SELECT
STPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
STPOL.REVISION_NUM,
STPOL.QUANTITY,
STPOL.UNIT_PRICE,
STPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
STPOL.ATTRIBUTE4,
STPOL.ATTRIBUTE5,
STPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
STPOL.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
STPOL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINES_ARCHIVE_ALL STPOL
UNION ALL
SELECT
EXPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
EXPOL.REVISION_NUM,
EXPOL.QUANTITY,
EXPOL.UNIT_PRICE,
EXPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE4,
EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE5,
EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
EXPOL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
EXPOL.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
EXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_PO_LINES_ARCHIVE_ALL EXPOL
)ST
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON ( ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON ( NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.PO_LINE_ID 
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPOL.SS_CD )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_REVISION NPOR
ON ( NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
AND NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT = ST.REVISION_NUM )

SELECT
PO_LINE_ID                    	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
PO_HEADER_ID                  	,
LINE_TYPE_ID                  	,
LINE_NUM                      	,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             	,
CREATION_DATE                 	,
CREATED_BY                    	,
ITEM_ID                       	,
ITEM_REVISION                 	,
CATEGORY_ID                   	,
ITEM_DESCRIPTION              	,
UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE         	,
QUANTITY_COMMITTED            	,
COMMITTED_AMOUNT              	,
ALLOW_PRICE_OVERRIDE_FLAG     	,
NOT_TO_EXCEED_PRICE           	,

FROM_LINE_ID                  	,

CLOSED_DATE                   	,

TRANSACTION_REASON_CODE       	,
ORG_ID                        	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1             	,

GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            	,

SECONDARY_QUANTITY            	,

AUCTION_DISPLAY_NUMBER        	,
AUCTION_LINE_NUMBER          	,
BID_NUMBER                   	,
BID_LINE_NUMBER              	,
SUPPLIER_REF_NUMBER           	,

OKE_CONTRACT_VERSION_ID       	,
RETROACTIVE_DATE              	,

SVC_AMOUNT_NOTIF_SENT         	,
SVC_COMPLETION_NOTIF_SENT     	,
BASE_UNIT_PRICE               	,
MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG      	,
RETAINAGE_RATE                	,
MAX_RETAINAGE_AMOUNT          	,
PROGRESS_PAYMENT_RATE         	,
RECOUPMENT_RATE               	,
CATALOG_NAME                  	,
SUPPLIER_PART_AUXID           	,
IP_CATEGORY_ID                	,
LAST_UPDATED_PROGRAM          	,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
ACTION_CD                     	,
CREATE_DATETIME               	,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINES_ARCHIVE_ALL ST
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL , $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT  = ST.PO_LINE_ID 
AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPOL.SS_CD)
OR NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_REVISION NPOR , $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
AND NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.PO_LINE_ID 
AND NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT = ST.REVISION_NUM
AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
